name: icu_rct_placebo_strategy
description: ICU/critical care RCTs, with a placebo/sham/usual-care comparator; use query.term for CT.gov API v2.

icu_rct_broad.query.term: AREA[StudyType]INTERVENTIONAL AND AREA[DesignAllocation]RANDOMIZED AND ("intensive care" OR "critical care" OR ICU OR "intensive therapy unit" OR "high dependency unit" OR "critical illness" OR "mechanical ventilation" OR ventilator OR "septic shock" OR "vasopressor")

icu_rct_placebo.query.term: AREA[StudyType]INTERVENTIONAL AND AREA[DesignAllocation]RANDOMIZED AND ("intensive care" OR "critical care" OR ICU OR "intensive therapy unit" OR "high dependency unit" OR "critical illness" OR "mechanical ventilation" OR ventilator OR "septic shock" OR "vasopressor") AND (placebo OR sham OR "standard care" OR "usual care")
